title: Rose-ash over speckled buff
result: A warm blush that breaks softly on the rims. Stable at cone 6, no crawling across three test tiles.

title: Sky blue, 3% rutile
result: Lovely depth on vertical walls but pools too dark in the wells. Reducing rutile to 1.5% next batch.

title: Fern celadon on white stoneware
result: Translucent and calm; takes brushwork beautifully. This one becomes the botanical plate glaze.

title: Coral matte, layered
result: Gorgeous velvet surface, but slightly dry to the touch. Trying a thin gloss overcoat on the drinking edge.

title: Pink & sky double-dip
result: The overlap line where the two glazes meet is the whole point — soft lavender halo every firing.

title: Natural speckle, iron-rich clay
result: Barely-there clear over a toasty body. The freckles do all the work; nothing to fix here.
